title: The special world
description: The Special World is a mod for minecraft that adds new biomes, changes the world and not only.
body:
THE SPECIAL WORLD
 

The Special World is a mod for minecraft that adds new biomes, changes the world and not only.

Take a fresh look at the world by visiting a variety of biomes!

Here are the most important of them:

Magic Forest

Look at this! Now the trees, the grass, and even the air have turned blue! Instead of the usual ones, magical oaks grow here. There is also a small chance that you will meet a real magician's tower here! True, (so far) there is no magician in it, but two chests in it are filled to the top with various values. There are enchanted things there too! But the main thing is that there is… DIAMONDS!

 

Bloody Savanna

No one hides that the usual savannah in Minecraft already has red shades. But this is too little for us! We decided to make it even redder, to the very limit! There is nothing interesting in it yet except for bloody acacias, but we plan to add some interesting structures there.


Sunny Valley

In addition to the desert, there are no particularly hot biomes in Minecraft. We have added another one. It's so hot there that it doesn't rain. Perhaps ordinary birches used to grow there, but after many years they became sunny. By the way, they glow in the dark!

 

We hope you enjoy this mod. So far, there are quite a few errors and shortcomings in it, and the current version has a Beta postfix. We will try to add more structures and biomes to the release, maybe even something more!

For more regular updates, visit our CurseForge page
